[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111111 a
2 11111111 a
3 11111001 6
4 11111011 7
5 01011111 6
6 11100000 3
7 00111111 6

70 01111111 7
